violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. Observed 0 ppm chlorine in the bar undercounter dish machine.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of chicken was noted not being properly dated for disposition. Observed food items such as house made sauces marinated meats and fresh ingredients in kitchen prep-top cooler.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups noted being stored on the floor in dry good storage area above walk in cooler.
